bio:
I'm Sivakumar and I am Software Architect with over 18 years of experience at a major U.S. retailer and Fintech, my expertise is concentrated on architecting large-scale, 
    secure, and resilient cloud solutions and hybrid environments. My background includes deep specialization in driving software development, artificial Intelligence, machine learning, 
    cloud migration, cloud modernization, operational efficiency, data protection, optimizing performance across complex systems, ensuring strict adherence to compliance and business 
    objectives.

experience.summary: Leading the platform group: API strategy, cloud architecture, and the rollout of AI-powered customer experiences.
Architected the next-generation payments platform serving millions of daily transactions across multiple regions.
